metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude skills for development workflows

plugins.name: all-skills
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that installs all available skills from all plugins

plugins.name: allium
plugins.description: Opinionated Allium integration for /core:agent-loop

plugins.name: awman
plugins.description: awman: parallel AI code agent sessions with container isolation, worktrees, and a REST API

plugins.name: altana
plugins.description: altana CLI wrapper: delegate prompts to sandboxed AI harnesses, run council fan-outs for diverse perspectives, and distribute tasks across harness presets

plugins.name: ansible
plugins.description: Ansible automation skills: playbooks, inventory, roles, vault secrets, and Molecule testing

plugins.name: claude-code
plugins.description: Claude Code-specific skills: plugin marketplace management and validation

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Essential development skills: Git, documentation, code review, accessibility, security

plugins.name: dagu
plugins.description: Dagu workflow orchestration: workflows, web UI, REST API

plugins.name: elixir
plugins.description: Elixir development skills: Phoenix, OTP, Ports, Ecto, Tidewave MCP, testing, configuration, style

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub Actions, Workflows, act local testing, community health files, Dependabot consolidation, and PR review

plugins.name: graphify
plugins.description: Graphify knowledge-graph tool: build a queryable graph of a codebase and query it instead of reading raw files

plugins.name: agent-sandboxing
plugins.description: Agent sandboxing for AI coding agents: 7 skills (including a sandbox index for progressive disclosure) + 6 slash commands for microVM and kernel-isolated execution on Kubernetes (kind+Kata, GKE+Kata, kina+Apple Container). Designed to grow to non-k8s sandboxing paths.

plugins.name: linear
plugins.description: Linear project management: MCP/GraphQL API, VantageEx epic authoring, auditing, and grooming

plugins.name: playwright
plugins.description: Playwright MCP browser automation for Claude Code

plugins.name: proxmox
plugins.description: Operate a Proxmox estate: PVE hypervisor, PBS backups, PDM multi-node management, golden-image builds, and terraform/packer automation

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA team that validates a running application against Gherkin user stories using Playwright and Tidewave

plugins.name: runex
plugins.description: Runex workflow engine: API, bundles, step logs, and debugging

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Rust programming skills + adversarial-TDD worker agents (rust-test-author, rust-implementer)

plugins.name: sbx
plugins.description: Docker Sandboxes (sbx CLI): run AI coding agents in isolated microVMs with hypervisor-level isolation

plugins.name: slidev
plugins.description: Slidev presentation skills: strategy, branding, interactive demos, markdown slides, syntax, code blocks, export, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: tweag
plugins.description: Tweag tools: Topiary universal code formatter and Nickel configuration language

plugins.name: ui
plugins.description: UI framework skills: daisyUI components and theming

plugins.name: wasm
plugins.description: WebAssembly skills: wasmtime runtime, component model, guest compilation, and host embedding

plugins.name: whamm
plugins.description: whamm! WebAssembly bytecode instrumentation: mise install, the instr/info CLI, injection strategies, and the DTrace-inspired .mm monitor DSL

plugins.name: zig
plugins.description: Zig programming skills: build system, comptime, allocators, error handling, C interop, testing, and troubleshooting

plugins.name: claudio
plugins.description: Comprehensive project analysis and planning system with parallel discovery agents
